faqs.question: Which courses does Kailash Womens College offer?
faqs.answer: Kailash Womens College provides programmes including M.Phil, B.A, B.Sc, B.Com, M.A, M.Com, M.Sc. in streams such as Accounting & Commerce, Humanities & Social Sciences, Science, Design, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in English, Computer Science, Mathematics, Physics, Zoology, Botany, Biotechnology, Microbiology, Textile Design, Chemistry.

faqs.question: What is the fee for different programs at Kailash Womens College?
faqs.answer: Students can expect to pay around INR 4000 for the programs offered by the Kailash Womens College.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Kailash Womens College?
faqs.answer: The seats availability for offered courses at Kailash Womens College goes up to 1098.

review_content.Placements: Online Assessment Test: This is the first round of the Infosys recruitment process. Technical Interview: If you qualified for the online test, which is the first round, then you go for a technical interview. HR Interview: If you clear the technical interview round, you will be eligible for the HR round. If you want to apply to Infosys, you need to have certain academic qualifications. You should have at least 60% marks in Class 10 and 12, and 65% or higher in B.Tech.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel at Kailash Women's College is very cheap. But getting a hostel seat is very tough. Most of the seats are reserved for students from a weaker financial background as other students can afford staying outside. In the hostel, different hostel blocks have different charges based on the facilities. To give you a rough idea, in 2012, the room in the best block cost less than Rs. 3000 a month. These were double occupancy rooms with a study table, an inbuilt rack, cot, and ceiling fan. All hostel blocks are two-story buildings which are definitely over 50 years old. There is a plan to renovate and build a hostel with a lot more floors. Until then, the hostel is going to be limited, and the accommodation not very fancy. The hostel at Kailash Women's is very cheap. But getting a hostel seat is very tough. Most of the seats are reserved for students from a weaker financial background as other students can afford staying outside. In the hostel, different hostel blocks have different charges.

college_info.college_name: Vignan’s Foundation for Science, Technology & Research: Courses, Fees, Admission 2026, Placement

highlights.summary:
The TG EAPCET 2026 registration has commenced for Vignan Institute of Technology and Science admission to BPharma and BE/BTech courses. The deadline to register without a late fee is Apr 4, 2026. The entrance exam for BPharm is scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, while the BE/BTech exam will be held from May 9 to May 11, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
As a university known for its Engineering programmes the flagship course at Vignan’s Foundation for Science, Technology & Research are its BTech and MTech programmes. These courses are highly sought-after for their placements especially for the BTech programme while the MTech programme provides a fast track for more advanced roles in Research & Development. These courses are extended under a number of specialisations as listed here:
The college extends these programmes to students at UG and PG levels for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively, with a comprehensive curriculum. VFSTR Hyderabad courses are made to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the other popular programmes at Vignan University Hyderabad below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities

faqs.answer: A:    As per the latest report, the participating recruiters presented over 1,076 job offers to the students of the batch 2022 of courses like BTech, MCA, MBA etc. The total number of offers provided to students during Vignan Institute of Technology and Science placements between 2020 and 2022 are tabulated below:ParticularsPlacement Statistics (2020)Placement Statistics (2021)Placement Statistics (2022)Total offers5028251,076

faqs.question: What is the placement scenario at Vignan Institute of Technology and Science?

faqs.answer: A:    As per the external sources, a major portion of Vignan Institute of Technology alumni is placed in the Engineering sector (34%) followed by IT (22%) and Business Development (7%). The pie chart below illustrates a sector-wise bifurcation of Vignan Institute of Technology and Science alumni placements throughout the years:Note: The ‘Others’ category includes Consulting, Sales, Arts & Design, Research, Customer Success & Support, Marketing, Community & Social Services and Media & Communicati
faqs.question: Where do Vignan Institute of Technology and Science alumni work?

faqs.answer: A:    Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research offers various courses at UG, PG and PhD level. The college accepts different entrance exam score for different courses. Some of the entrance exam score accepted by the college are as below:V-SAT/EAMCET- BTech/BPharma/BSc Agriculture CAT/MAT/I-CET- MBA GATE/PGECET/VUGATE- MTech ICET- PG courses like MCA
faqs.question: What are the different entrance exams accepted at Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates applying for MBA at Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research should have doen graduation with atleast 55% aggregate score. Students have to be qualified in ICET / MAT Score above 500 / Min. 70 percentile in CAT (OR) 60% in B.Tech. Graduates who did not appear for any entrance test, have to give written test.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for applying for MBA programme at Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fees of the MBA course at Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology & Research is INR 6 lakh. Overall fee may include certain other components such as hostel and mess fees (if available), exam fees, security deposists, etc.
faqs.question: What is the fees of MBA at Vignan’s Foundation for Science, Technology & Research?

faqs.answer: A:    VFSTR Hyderabad courses are offered to students at UG and PG levels, mainly in the field of Engineering. The college offers various programmes such as BTech, BBA, BSc, MBA, MCA, MSc, etc. across several specialisations. The college offers a BTech programme to students at the UG level for a duration of 4 years in full-time mode. Further, the fees of the BTech programme at VFSTR ranges between INR 4 Lacs and INR 14.4 lakh.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Vignan’s Foundation for Science, Technology and Research, Hyderabad.

review_content.Placements: We have the best placements in Vignan Foundation College. Forty percent of the students are in the EEE course. The highest package is about 20 lakhs per annum, and the minimum is 5 lakhs per annum. Many top companies come to our college to offer high-paying jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Vignan Foundation has the best infrastructure. We have all subject labs, digital classrooms, and a well-stocked library with central AC and Wi-Fi available here. We have nice facilities in the hostel. We have canteens for both hostelers and day boarders.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Best college for the students who only focus on studies.

review_content.Placements: In our Vignan College, 80% of students are placed in different companies. The highest package is 21 LPA and the lowest package is 2.6 LPA. Many big companies have recruited, such as Infosys, Global Logic, HSBC, Wipro, Cognizant, HCL, etc. Over 40% of students got selected for internships at Cognizant.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our department offers well-equipped classrooms, Wi-Fi, advanced labs for practical sessions, and access to a digital and physical library for vast academic resources. The infrastructure supports interactive learning and research-based activities. We have the best medical room also.

faqs.answer: Vignan Institute of Technology and Science is a good institution for M.E./M.Tech, B.E. / B.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Vignan Institute of Technology and Science are Mechanical Engineering, Power Engineering, VLSI Design, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Instrumentation Technology, Information Technology.
faqs.question: Q: What specializations do Vignan Institute of Technology and Science offer in their courses?

faqs.answer: Vignan Institute of Technology and Science offers Degree courses including 10 UG and 7 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Vignan Institute of Technology and Science has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Mechanical Engineering, Power Engineering, VLSI Design, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Instrumentation Technology, Civil Engineering, Information Technology.
faqs.question: Q: Which major specializations are available at Vignan Institute of Technology and Science?

faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Vignan Institute of Technology and Science are M.E./M.Tech, B.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. overview_faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the Vignan Institute of Technology and Science?
overview_faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the Vignan Institute of Technology and Science is around INR 114000 - INR 400000.

review_summary.college_name: Vignan’s Foundation for Science, Technology & Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Vignan the great college, which is on 650 acres of land.

content.Placements: I am currently studying in 1 year of CSM totally 29% of students have been selected for our course. 19 LPA is the highest in our college till now. I heard there are companies like Infosys, TCS, and Amazon that are coming for the hiring, and mostly all of the members got the internship.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good, it was built on 650 acres. We don't get a signal since it is in the forest. We had a library whose infrastructure is awesome, and it has lots of book which helps to improve our knowledge. The food available in the hostel is quite good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty. Good placements in 2024, not good.

content.Placements: 6 percent of students were placed. The highest is 22 LPA (off-campus), the lowest is 2.5 LPA, and the average is 3.5 LPA. Infosys, Cognizant, Accenture, 1 percent. A very basic level of teaching, I prefer not to join. The packages are just given to the top. They would get from multiple companies.
content.Infrastructure: No proper number of classrooms. No proper Wi-Fi. Hostels are good with a good menu and good food. No sports or any activities. The canteen is okay, not the best taste. The quality of food is not much better. The cost of food is more expensive than at other colleges.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Vignan’s Foundation for Science, Technology and Research, Hyderabad.

content.Placements: We have the best placements in Vignan Foundation College. Forty percent of the students are in the EEE course. The highest package is about 20 lakhs per annum, and the minimum is 5 lakhs per annum. Many top companies come to our college to offer high-paying jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Vignan Foundation has the best infrastructure. We have all subject labs, digital classrooms, and a well-stocked library with central AC and Wi-Fi available here. We have nice facilities in the hostel. We have canteens for both hostelers and day boarders.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best college for the students who only focus on studies.

content.Placements: In our Vignan College, 80% of students are placed in different companies. The highest package is 21 LPA and the lowest package is 2.6 LPA. Many big companies have recruited, such as Infosys, Global Logic, HSBC, Wipro, Cognizant, HCL, etc. Over 40% of students got selected for internships at Cognizant.
content.Infrastructure: Our department offers well-equipped classrooms, Wi-Fi, advanced labs for practical sessions, and access to a digital and physical library for vast academic resources. The infrastructure supports interactive learning and research-based activities. We have the best medical room also.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of the placements.

content.Placements: Placements are very good at Vignan. Many students of this college have secured placements in Infosys, HCL, Global Logic, and many more companies. They are placed in product-based companies. The maximum package is about 12 LPA which is offered by HSBC.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is top-notch. We cannot name it. They are very well designed. Classrooms are very good and have digital boards. Wi-Fi is top notch. Labs are very well-equipped with the latest software. The quality of food in hostel is good.

admission_overview.description: Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research offers admissions to Diploma, UG, PG and PhD courses in various streams.There are various UG courses offered by this college such as BTech, BPharms, BCA, BSc, BBA, BA LLB, BBA/LLB. admission_process.title: Vignan’s Foundation for Science, Technology & Research Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research admission process 2026is conducted online. The college offers entrance-based admission. Interested candidates can check below the detailed steps forVignan’s Foundation for Science, Technology & Research admission process:-
1. Application

The application process for Vignans Foundation for Science, Technology and Research is conducted in an online mode. Candidates can apply online on the college's official website and register for their desired courses. Along with that, they must submit the important documents and an application fee to finalise the application process.
2. Selection Rounds

Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research admission is primarily entrance-based for UG, PG, and PhD courses. For the BTech course the aspiring candidates need EAMCET/V-SAT and to be selected for the MTech programme, the candidates need to have a GATE/PGECET/VUGATE score. Similarly, they must qualify for admission in rest of the courses. Further, based on the application, entrance exam scores and interview candidates will be shortlisted.
3.Final Admission

After the completion of all the rounds, candidates will be notified about their selection. The selected candidates must pay the registration fee along with theVignan’s Foundation for Science, Technology & Research fee. Further, they must also submit a photocopy of all the documents as proof at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Does Vignans Foundation for Science, Technology and Research offer BTech in Data Science?
faqs.answer: Yes, Vignans Foundation for Science, Technology and Research offers a BTech in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) with an intake capacity of 180 seats. This course is designed to prepare students for data-centric roles in industries using real-time tools and analytics.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in BTech at Vignan Institute of Technology and Science?
faqs.answer: Candidates will have to appear in TS EAMCET to get admission in BTech course at Vignans Foundation for Science, Technology and Research.Seats are allocated under counselling according to ranks and eligibility.The candidate should also possess minimum academic requirements at Class 12.Selection is done by verifying of documents and payment of fee.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech admission at Vignans Foundation for Science, Technology and Research?
faqs.answer: Candidates must have passed Class 12 with a minimum of 60% marks in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics. They must also qualify for theTS EAMCETentrance exam conducted in Telangana. Final selection atVignan Institute of Technology and Scienceis based on the EAMCET rank and counselling performance.

courses_data.description: Vignans Foundation for Science, Technology and Researchoffers theMBAcourse for a duration of two years. The course is offered in full-time mode.Admissions are based on a valid score in theTSICET/CAT/ MAT exam. Graduates who did not appear for any entrance exam will have to appear for written test. After the entrance exam, students have to participate in group discussion round and give personal interview. Candidates willing to take admission must apply online on the official website of the college.

faqs.question: What is the fees of MBA at Vignan’s Foundation for Science, Technology & Research?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fees of the MBA course at Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology & Research is INR 6 lakh. Overall fee may include certain other components such as hostel and mess fees (if available), exam fees, security deposists, etc.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for taking admission in MBA at Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research?
faqs.answer: Candidates applying for MBA at Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research should have scored 55% in any Bachelor's Degree. Aspirants should have qualified in ICET / MAT Score above 500 / minimum 70 percentile in CAT (OR) 60% in B.Tech.

faqs.question: How can I take admission in MBA at Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research if I have not given MAT, CAT or ICET?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have not appeared in any entrance test should have a Bachelor's Degree with at least 55% marks.  They will have to give a written test: same as I-CET. Students have to qualify  in Written Test, Group Discussion and Personal Interview for taking admission in MBA at Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research.

courses_data.description: Vignans Foundation for Science, Technology and Research offers MTech in specialisations like CSE, VLSI, and Embedded Systems. Admissions are through TS PGECET or GATE scores, followed by counselling. The program focuses on advanced technical training, research, and project-based learning.

faqs.question: How can I apply for M.Tech at Vignans Foundation for Science, Technology and Research?
faqs.answer: Admission into M.Tech can be done using TS PGECET/GATE scores.After the declaration of results, apply to counselling and make Vignans Foundation for Science, Technology and Research as a preference.The applicants are admitted in light of their scores, seats and eligibility.Verification of documents and submission of fees is necessary in order to give a final selection.

faqs.question: What all specialisations are offered under the M.Tech course at Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research?
faqs.answer: The M.Tech course at Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research is offered in the following specialisations:-CSEEmbedded SystemsElectric Vehicle Technology,etc.

faqs.question: Is GATE score compulsory for M.Tech at Vignans Foundation for Science, Technology and Research?
faqs.answer: No a GATE score is optional.TS PGECET can be also used to secure admission to M.Tech at Vignans Foundation for Science, Technology and Research.The candidates should have requirements of graduation.Both the two entrance tests are enough to apply.

description: Vignan Institute of Technology and Science cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to various courses at the UG & PG levels. To check the cutoff details for different exams, rounds and categories, refer to the sections provided below. Candidates can check this page to view the Vignan Institute of Technology and Science TS EAMCET cutoff 2025, along with other exam cutoffs across various rounds and categories. A few more updates are below:

Vignan Institute of Technology and Science TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 28455 and 66148 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the closing rank for t

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Civil Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 28455, 31648 and 35665, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Vignan Institute of Technology and Science. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

reviews.review_heading: Vignan the great college, which is on 650 acres of land.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good, it was built on 650 acres. We don't get a signal since it is in the forest. We had a library whose infrastructure is awesome, and it has lots of book which helps to improve our knowledge. The food available in the hostel is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty. Good placements in 2024, not good.
reviews.review_text: No proper number of classrooms. No proper Wi-Fi. Hostels are good with a good menu and good food. No sports or any activities. The canteen is okay, not the best taste. The quality of food is not much better. The cost of food is more expensive than at other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vignan’s Foundation for Science, Technology and Research, Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: Vignan Foundation has the best infrastructure. We have all subject labs, digital classrooms, and a well-stocked library with central AC and Wi-Fi available here. We have nice facilities in the hostel. We have canteens for both hostelers and day boarders.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for the students who only focus on studies.
reviews.review_text: Our department offers well-equipped classrooms, Wi-Fi, advanced labs for practical sessions, and access to a digital and physical library for vast academic resources. The infrastructure supports interactive learning and research-based activities. We have the best medical room also.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the placements.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is top-notch. We cannot name it. They are very well designed. Classrooms are very good and have digital boards. Wi-Fi is top notch. Labs are very well-equipped with the latest software. The quality of food in hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure here.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very excellent. It has good facilities, a huge auditorium, and library. The hostel is quite amazing with good food. College has different labs for individual courses offered. It also separates auditorium and venue halls for events.

reviews.review_heading: This college is best if you just want to study and I say that the placement is not guaranteed.
reviews.review_text: I don’t live in the college hostel, but my friends say it’s neither too good nor too bad. The food is set for every day. The bus for girls goes outside the campus for a distance of some kilometers. I believe they are currently building a new hostel within the campus, but overall, I think it’s decent.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the fests and events.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides hostel facilities. But the quality of service is not upto the mark. Food taste is average and the fee is high compared to the outside hostels. Hostel has a Wi-Fi facility. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are available for the hostel students.

reviews.review_heading: "Rigorous academics at Vignan's Institute: A student's perspective."
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. We have 6 floors, and each floor consists of 3 to 5 labs. Mainly, our course or branch faculty members are very well trained, and they have great knowledge of the particular subjects. They are very cooperative with students and support and guide us very well regarding our academics. college_info.college_name: Wiztoonz Academy of Media and Design: Courses, Fees, Admissions 2025, Eligibility, Placements

highlights.summary: Wiztoonz Academy of Media and Design admissions 2025 are open for all the courses. Interested candidates can apply online on the official website.

college_info.intro:
Wiztoonz Academy of Media and Design is well-known for its popular programmes, namely BSc (Hons) Multimedia and Diploma in Graphic and UiUx Design. The training for these programmes is conducted in both on-campus and online modes.
Concepts such as animation, web design, video production, audio production, and graphic design are taught to the students of BSc (Hons) Multimedia. The duration for the same is 48 months. BSc (Hons) Multimedia students can become 3D Artist, Rotoscopy Artist, Graphic Designer and Motion Designer among many others. This degree is offered by the University of Mysore.
On the other hand, concepts such as drawing fundamentals, photography, graphic design, motion design, web design, and UIUX design are taught to the students of Diploma in Graphic and UiUX Design. The duration for the same is 12 months. This degree is offered by the Wiztoonz Academy of Media and Design. Admission to the Diploma courses is based on Class 10 or 12 merit score. Candidates can take a look below at the Wiztoonz Academy of Media and Design popular programmes:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Wiztoonz Academy of Media and Design provides Full Time and Part Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Design, Mass Communication & Media and Animation. UG programs include B.Sc. and UG Diploma. Further, the PG programs include M.Sc., PG Diploma and Others PG.

faqs.answer: A:    Wiztoonz Academy of Media and Design is not hard to get. Admission to the College is based on merit scores in the last qualifying exams. For Diploma programmes, candidates must have passed Class 10 or 12 from a recognised board. For other UG and PG courses, a bachelor's degree is required from a recognised university. Interested candidates must visit the official website, fill out the application form and submit the required documents.

review_content.Placements: The minimum of 90% of the students got placements. The highest salary offered was Rs. 35,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 10,000 per month. Top recruiting companies for our course are MPC, Byju's and many companies. The highest salary offered in our course is 2.5 lac per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 60,000 per month. About 40% to 50% of the students got internships from our course in companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities here are good. Our college has projectors, fans, rooms with a good environment, classrooms, tables, green screen room and audio recording room. Our hostel has a Wi-Fi facility, and it serves food three times. Our hostel has washrooms, good food, washing machine and mineral RO water facility.

review_content.Infrastructure: In my course the facilities and infrastructure given by the college like photoshoot room, green screen and VFX studio, classrooms, and they provided Wi-Fi also. The hostel was good in environment and nice place, food was good, and Medical care is also good.

reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure and faculty is awesome.

review_content.Placements: They give placements all over India and for those who are eligible. They give placement to those who are smart and creative and hardworking. They provide good campus placements with an awesome environment.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everyone from the security until the HOD, are respected. The classrooms are clean and Wi-Fi is available in the art lab. Every weekend they conduct seminars for students and the hostel is very nice. There are no power and water problems.
review_content.Faculty: In this college, the teachers are highly qualified and they have enough knowledge about the subject and they are updated. They teach us theoretically and digitally as well. They are very helpful to students no matter if it is mid-night or anything, once a student asks any doubt, they are always there for us. There is industry exposure and the course curriculum is very useful.

reviews.review_text: Everything is available, like labs, very good experienced faculty members. The college provides PG facility which has food served 3 times and a room, with TV, washing machine, Wi-Fi facility. The classrooms are designed in a way for teams to discuss the concept, or to work on an assignment.

college_info.college_name: Kumari Vidyavati Anand D.A.V. College For Women: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Kumari Vidyavati Anand D.A.V. College For Women Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

reviews_list.review_title: My review about Kav Dav College.

review_content.Placements: Placement opportunities are nil. I am in the fifth semester, and till now, no recruitment company has come to our college. The percentage of placement through the college is hardly 1%. Internships are also not offered to us. There are no internship and placement opportunities provided by our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not so good. The computers in all labs hardly work properly. They are so outdated that we are unable to use them. The library is also average, with no proper lighting. Basic necessities like washrooms and drinking water are also not adequately available. The hostel room walls are not in good condition. The hostel mess food is okay in taste, and the menu is also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty, average infrastructure, below-average placement, and absolute no exposure.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not good. We are not given an opportunity until the 2nd year of the internship or anything. Very few percentages, maybe 1-2%, only get placement from college. We are not even provided any guidance here related to the career. Only an online form is filled in the name of career counseling, but we have never gotten one.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. No smart boards are there. Computers of computer labs are so outdated that we can't use Tally on them effectively and efficiently. Drinking water facilities are okay, but washrooms are very bad. Lush doesn't work or they leak. Canteen food taste is not good. Only packaged food is preferred by students due to high price and less taste. Hostel facility is great and good of the hostel is also decent.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: My college is a very good college, and teachers are very humble and good.

review_content.Placements: The percentage about 30% to 40% of students were placed in my course, and the highest average package was 5 LPA to 7 LPA, while the lowest average package was 2 LPA to 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies Cipla, Zee Laboratories Limited, etc., 20% of students got internships from my college. Roles offered in quality, teaching, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities in my college were in good condition, labs and good infrastructure. Classrooms were of good quality, and Wi-Fi facilities were available. The quality of facilities in the hostel was provided, and the food quality was good. Sports and games were also good.

faqs.answer: A:    Combined intake across all courses at Sri Aurobindo Centre For Arts And Communication (SACAC) is up to 175. Sri Aurobindo Centre For Arts And Communication (SACAC) offers Diploma and Certificate courses including 2 UG and 3 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time and Part Time mode.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sri Aurobindo Centre For Arts And Communication (SACAC) is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose offline programmes from streams such as Mass Communication & Media, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ) and Animation. At the UG level, students can choose the available programme such as UG Diploma. Talking about PG level, the available course include PG Diploma. The fee structure for the Sri Aurobindo Centre For Arts And Communication (SACAC) programmes is around INR 12,000 to 3,79,000.

faqs.answer: A:    The selection criteria are a mix of entrance exams and merit-based. For a PG Diploma in Advertising and PR course, candidates are selected on a merit-based. For the rest of the UG Diploma and certificate course, candidates are selected on written test + interview. The mode of study is Full-time/Part Time - Online/Part Time - Classroom/Part Time - Blend/Part Time - Online

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Audio Engineering and Music Production - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Top notch faculty and superb placement experience.

content.Placements: Placement rate is 100% for my batch in which 20% students got direct jobs . 80% of the students got placed as interns and were later confirmed once their internship period ended with companies like TBWA, McCann, Isobar, PR - Pundit etc.
content.Infrastructure: We used to have smart classes with faculty who were working in the industry so we didn't get textbook knowledge but learnt from their experience as they have served in the industry for 2-3 decades. The campus, classroom, canteen everything was great.

individual_reviews.title: An experience of learning and networking .

K. Swami BBDO - Top role offered was Account Executive .
content.Infrastructure: - In the midst of the hustle-bustle of the city, SACAC is one of the greenest campuses - The classrooms were equipped with Wi-Fi, iMac, Projector and Sound systems - DSLR cameras were provided by the college for photography & filmmaking assignments - The canteen was good, the staff was amicable .

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Advertising and Public Relations - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with Sri Aurobindo Centre For Arts And Communication.

content.Placements: About 90% of placements happened within the course duration. Students got placements in companies like Adfactors PR, Jajabor, and Korra. Positions secured by students are account Executive, account associates, junior content writer, junior brand consultant, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is beautiful. Classrooms are well-equipped with Wi-Fi, cameras, video recorder, sound box, etc. The cafeteria serves a variety of food. It is the best place to relax after classes. Most memorable classes are brand, photography, and filmmaking. The library is full of informative books and magazines.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Advertising and Public Relations - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It has amazing faculty and a hands-on learning environment.

content.Placements: Placements take a lot of time in the current job market, but SACAC ensured that each of us had a job, even if it took a few months after our course ended. We were recruited by some of the biggest names in advertising and PR, like Dentsu, Genesis, and Adfactors. The recruitment process is student-led with all the help from the faculty, so the batch got hands-on help on how to polish their CVs as well.
content.Infrastructure: I was a part of the batch that came during COVID, which meant that my interaction with the campus was extremely limited. We attended offline classes for a few months, and it was such a refreshing place to be after being cooped UPAT home for so long. The campus is green and seems hidden away from the city life right outside its gates. It's the perfect place to get creatively inspired, with students sitting in the gardens and sketching, or roaming around filming for their projects.

admission_overview.college_name: Sri Aurobindo Centre For Arts And Communication (SACAC) Course Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection Criteria, Application

admission_process.title: Sri Aurobindo Centre For Arts And Communication Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sri Aurobindo Centre For Arts And Communication (SACAC) admission 2025is open. The college offers courses, such as PG Diploma in Advertising and PR Course, Diploma in Audio Engineering and Music Production, Diploma in Professional Photography, Certificate Course in Music Production, Intensive Foundation Course in Photography etc. at the Postgraduate Diploma, Diploma and Certificate level. To get admission toSACAC, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college.

The college offers 11 courses and the mode of study is full-time/part-time - online/part-time - classroom and part-time - blend. The selection criteria for the course are both merit and entrance exams. However, all applicants, except for photography, are required to take a programme-specific written exam as part of the selection process atSri Aurobindo Centre For Arts And Communication.
Sri Aurobindo Centre For Arts And Communicationadmission 2025is entrance-based except for photography. Check out the following table for details aroundSACACcourse admissions 2025:
Particulars
SAAC Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

SACAC courses' admissions are based on both merit and entrance exams. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularSri Aurobindo Centre For Arts And Communication courses:

* ForCertificate Course in Creative Writing, Certificate Course in Music Production,Certificate Course in Graphic Design, Certificate Course in Painting and Sketching and Certificate Course in Motion Graphics, candidate age should be 16+. For the Certificate Course in Music Business Management, candidates' age should be 18+.

Sri Aurobindo Centre For Arts And Communication admission process includes registration written exam + interview for UG diploma and certificate courses. For PG diploma courses, candidates are selected on a merit basis.
STEP 1: Sri Aurobindo Centre For Arts And Communication Application Process 2025

Candidates can opt for online or offline procedures as per requirement. For online application, candidates can visit this link, https://www.sac.ac.in/admission-form-adpr/. Students who are looking for offline applications must visit the official website to know more.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Students will be selected based on written tests + interview/merit-based.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

paragraphs: Zee Institute of Creative Art, Bhubaneswar admissions 2025are entrance based.Zee Institute of Creative Art, Bhubaneswaroffers 3 years B.Voc in1specialisation. The course is offered in Full Time mode. Admission is entrance based. The accepted entrance exam includesISC, Odisha CHSE, and ZICA Creativity Test. Interested candidates can apply online on the official website of the institution.
Know more aboutZee Institute of Creative Art, Bhubaneswar courses

Zee Institute of Creative Art, Bhubaneswar admission processis inclusive of multiple steps. Candidates can go through the following steps to secure admission to Zee Institute of Creative Art, Bhubaneswar:
Step 1: Application Process
Students can apply directly on the college's official website to apply for UG courses. Admissions are currently ongoing for all the courses offered at UG, Certificate and Diploma levels.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Zee Institute of Creative Art, Bhubaneswar admissions are completely merit-based. Students are offered direct admission based on their past academic merit of the last qualifying exam of Class 12. The shortlisted students are called for PI round for the final selection.
Step 3: Final Admission
At last, the selected candidates must pay a certain fee to confirm their seats at the college.

The institute offers certificate courses in Creative Writing, Extension Programmes, Online Script Writing, Photography, Public Speaking and Personality Development. Below are Xavier Institute of Communications courses and :

faqs.answer: A:    The Xavier Institute of Communications (XIC) conducts the XIC Entrance Test (XET) to offer admissions to eligible candidates in mass communication courses available at the institute.The online exam consists of two parts First is objectiveAnd the second is subjective The test is total of 2 hours1 hours for objective and 1 hours for subjective .After this online paper they conduct the personal interview.Based on your performance they make sure you are eligible for the admission or not.
faqs.question: What is the entrance exam for Xavier Institute of Communications 2024?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can get admission to Xavier Institute of Communications with 60% in Class 12th. All it matter is yours XIC OET score and interview performance. XIC OET 2022 Eligibility Criteria are listed below,  Candidates must be under the age of 35.Candidates must have completed three years of graduation (12+3 years) in one of the following streams from an Indian university: (Arts, Commerce, Science, Computers, BMM, BMS, BE, Catering, and other related fields)Candidates from the previous semester are also able to apply for the exam.
faqs.question: Can I get admission to Xavier Institute of Communications with 60% in Class 12th?

faqs.answer: A:    The Xavier Institute of Communications (XIC) in Mumbai determines cut off marks for its PG Diploma course based on the OET (Online Entrance Test). The OET has a maximum score of 150 marks and takes 1 hour and 30 minutes to complete.  Students must have at least 45% marks in PCM in their class 12th-grade examination from an approved board. The qualifying mark to appear for the entrance test is 65% marks at the class XII Board examinations for candidates belonging to the General Category.  The XIC OET 2023 exam pattern is:  Maximum marks: 150Duration of exam: 1 hour 30 minutesSections in paper: 2 (Objective and Subjective)
faqs.question: How are Xavier Institute of Communications 2023 cut off marks determined?

faqs.answer: A:    For their BMS courseOut of the total 60 seats in the college15% seats of the course are reserved for case A- Management quota reserved seatsOut of the balance 51 seats- 50% of the seats are reserved for the Christian minority- Case D42% of the seats are available to the general category of students -Case D5% of the seats are reserved for persons with disability-Case D3% are reserved for special category-Case D Case A is the category where college are obliged to give the admission and Case D is where the admission is done on the basis of merit.Special Category refers to:Wards of Transferred State / Central Govt. and Private Sector employees, employees of Defence Department / ex-servicemenWards of Freedom FightersAward Winners at the District / State / National Levels in Sports or Cultural Activities.

review_content.Placements: The best placements are provided in the advertising industry. Prominent employers include Publicizes Group, Dentsu Network etc. The college helps students align their interests with the industry requirements. They ensure 100% placements for all the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything that is needed to hone your skills in the advertising industry is available in the college. Wi-Fi facility is available. reviews_list.review_title: Insightful and worth every penny.

review_content.Placements: The internships are mandatory and a part of the course curriculum. The college assists in setting up the internships for all the 60 students. These are with the leading PR agencies in the country. Agencies like Genesis Burson-Marsteller, MSL, Text 100, Adfactors, Cohn & Wolfe are some of the names that recruit the students year on year. After your internship, most of the students are given a pre-placement offer by the firms. They have the choice to accept or reject the same. Further, at the end of the course, the placements are arranged for those remaining. The entire process is handled meticulously by the course head.

review_summary.college_name: Xavier Institute of Communication Mumbai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: PG Diploma in Journalism and Media convergence - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides a great course curriculum but has average placements.

content.Placements: Placements for journalism are not provided in our college. Media related companies don't visit for placements. Only advertising and PR course have placements. I suggest that don't depend on the college for placements if you are a journalism student.
content.Infrastructure: You don't get hostels in XIC. However, PGs are very easily available, and the college will provide a number of PGs. The infrastructure of our college is amazing, and the classrooms are spacious and well-equipped. Our college has two campuses, and one is in Xavier's college, while the other one is in Xavier High School, which takes 5 minutes to reach by walk. Classes are held alternately every month at every campus.

individual_reviews.course: Advanced Integrated Communication Program - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Amazing subjects + great faculty.

content.Placements: No placements provided as it's a working professionals course. Everyone is a working professional so no placements are provided. Everyone from different backgrounds come for this course because they would like to know more about how media works in the present world.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college campus is A+. It has all the latest equipment you would need for a media school. All the classrooms have a PC + Wi-Fi connection + projectors. We are shown ad films where an ad production class was held because learning production theoretically is not possible.

individual_reviews.course: PG Diploma in Advertising, Marketing Communications & Customer Analytics - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: XIC provides the best college experience for a communications student.

content.Placements: The best placements are provided in the advertising industry. Prominent employers include Publicizes Group, Dentsu Network etc. The college helps students align their interests with the industry requirements. They ensure 100% placements for all the students.
content.Infrastructure: Everything that is needed to hone your skills in the advertising industry is available in the college. Wi-Fi facility is available. Well-equipped labs are available with the latest version of important software. A well-stocked library is available with all types of books and DVDs.

individual_reviews.course: PG Diploma in Public Relations and Corporate Communication - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Insightful and worth every penny.

content.Placements: The internships are mandatory and a part of the course curriculum. The college assists in setting up the internships for all the 60 students. These are with the leading PR agencies in the country. Agencies like Genesis Burson-Marsteller, MSL, Text 100, Adfactors, Cohn & Wolfe are some of the names that recruit the students year on year. After your internship, most of the students are given a pre-placement offer by the firms. They have the choice to accept or reject the same. Further, at the end of the course, the placements are arranged for those remaining. The entire process is handled meticulously by the course head.

individual_reviews.course: PG Diploma in Event Planning & Experiential Marketing - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The perfect place to learn and grow.

content.Placements: Well, we had some non-profit organisations that came for the placements. It is not necessary that you would be paid as per your expectation straight away. The starting was as basic as Rs. 15,000 per month. The students were mostly hired for the field work rather than into the research and operational process.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities in the college are up to the mark. We had proper computer labs, photography studio, quick responding, and student-friendly administrating staff, regular provision of class notes, and a library that catered books of the various genres. Though the Wi-Fi was a bit of a problem, it is good. We had a common canteen with St. Xavier's College, and the food was edible. There is no hostel provision for the students.

AsXIC Mumbai admissions are entrance based, students must appear and clear theXIC Online Entrance Test(OET) conducted by the institute to be shortlisted. Aspirants can follow the steps mentioned below to complete theXavier Institute of Communication admission process:
1. Application Process

Interested candidates can visit the official website of the institute and register themselves by filling out the registration/application form available. Students need to pay a registration fee of INR 4,000 to successfully submit the form.
2. Selection Process

The institute will shortlist the candidates based on their performance in the entrance exam and other parameters, such as age, academic performance, etc. Apart from the entrance test, students must appear for the live interview as well.
3. Admission Confirmation
Once the candidates have been shortlisted, they will have to pay the course fee to complete theadmission process of XIC Mumbai.

courses_data.description: At Xavier Institute of Communications, students can enroll in various postgraduate diploma programmes primarily in the fields ofjournalismandmass communication. The basic eligibility required for the course is to pass graduation in any stream from a recognised university. Students appearing for the final year exam can also apply forXIC Mumbai PG Diplomaadmission. The maximum age of a candidate should be not more than 35 years at the time of applying.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to Xavier Institute of Communications with 60% in Class 12th?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can get admission to Xavier Institute of Communications with 60% in Class 12th. All it matter is yours XIC OET score and interview performance. XIC OET 2022 Eligibility Criteria are listed below,Candidates must be under the age of 35.Candidates must have completed three years of graduation (12+3 years) in one of the following streams from an Indian university: (Arts, Commerce, Science, Computers, BMM, BMS, BE, Catering, and other related fields)Candidates from the previous semester are also able to apply for the exam.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to PGDM course at XIC Mumbai?
faqs.answer: At Xavier Institute of Communications, students can pursue various Postgraduate Diploma and Certificate courses. If you are seeking admissions for the PG Diploma programmes, you must fulfil the basic eligibility criteria of passing graduation from a recognised university. Additionally, also securing good marks in the XIC OET test. As for the study preparation tips to get admssion at the institute, you must brush up your language skills, General Knowledge and Knowledge of Media, Logical and Analytical skills.

faqs.question: Can I join Xavier Institute of Communications directly?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can get direct admission to the Xavier Institute of Communications (XIC) in Mumbai. The admission process involves:Filling out an application formTaking an online entrance testAppearing for a personal interviewRegistering for OETMaking the necessary paymentAnyone with an undergraduate degree in Arts, Commerce, Science, or Mass Media is eligible to apply.XIC students with a Diploma of Film, Television, or Journalism can get direct admission to the 2nd year Master of Arts in Cinema & Audiovisual. The course duration is 10 months (October – July) 2025.You can apply for all the Diploma courses on the official college website.

review_content.Placements: Our college allows all students, even if they also fail in many subjects, for placements, but if they get 60% in exams, they can get a job in many colleges. Apart from them, other companies also provide job opportunities. Accenture provides a minimum salary of Rs. 30,000 per month, and now it is more than Rs. 30,000 per month. Tata gives a salary of Rs. 30,000 per month and HCL gives a salary of Rs. 35,000 per month. We are given the option of trying from centralized placement cell initiated by the Delhi University for all students. However, the college didn't have the concept of placements. review_summary.college_name: Agurchand Manmull Jain College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good, you can join.

content.Placements: A lot of students are placed in many companies that come to our campus. The maximum salary is Rs. 15,000 and the minimum is Rs. 10,000. TCS, contests, and a lot of big companies also came there. I don't know how many students got an internship. The roles are like vice versa only, and some banks also come there.
content.Infrastructure: I'm not in a hostel, but I know that the infrastructure is good, and the internet is slow, which is also good because students will not be able to use mobile phones, and that is also really good for studies. In sports, all the things are there, you can perform if you have the skill, you perform, and are selected for the team.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This is the best college, and it provides the best placements.

content.Placements: 85 percent of students got internships. The highest salary package was 12 LPA. The lowest salary package was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Wipro, TCS, and Infosys. 70% of students got internships. The top roles offered were software developer and web developer.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities were good. There was a separate hostel for boys and girls. The bathrooms were neat. The hostel mess was good and tasty. The canteen was also available. Infrastructure was good. Classrooms were neat. Labs were good. Library was good. Medical facilities were available. The Wi-Fi was also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: College provided good and best placements.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students got placed. The highest salary package offered was 10 LPA. The lowest salary package was 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies were TCS, Infosys, and Cognizant. The top roles were web development and software development. 65 percent of students got internship.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure was good. The classroom looks very beautiful with AC. The lab was pretty with several computers. We have a huge library. The Wi-Fi connection was available. The hostel facilities were good with a separate hostel for boys and girls. The food was good. We had a tennis court at our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Marketing Management - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My honest review of my college.

content.Placements: Our college allows all students, even if they also fail in many subjects, for placements, but if they get 60% in exams, they can get a job in many colleges. It also helps in getting an internship if we put in some hard work, which means we can achieve it. Top recruiting companies like Accenture, Tata Tele Services, and HCL provide jobs to many students. Apart from them, other companies also provide job opportunities. Accenture provides a minimum salary of Rs. 30,000 per month, and now it is more than Rs. 30,000 per month. Tata gives a salary of Rs. 30,000 per month and HCL gives a salary of Rs. 35,000 per month. We are given the option of trying from centralized placement cell initiated by the Delhi University for all students. However, the college didn't have the concept of placements. I went for CPC and got an offer from Genpact with a salary of Rs. 22,000 per month, which I turned down as I was interested in pursuing B.Com.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is recommended only if students are doing professional courses side by side.

content.Placements: A maximum of 20-25% of students get placed on campus. The maximum package is 4 LPA, and the minimum package is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies for my course are Sutherland, TCS, HDFC Bank, etc. 25-30% of students get internships. The top roles offered by employers in campus interviews are manager, assistant manager, and accountant.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel infrastructure is good enough. The canteen, hostel mess and dining facilities are poor. Sports and games are not promoted but we can train and practice by ourselves. There is no library in the hostel. There is no medical first aid center in the hostel except for room maintenance. Our college hostel is not encouraged.

faqs.question: What is the effectiveness of the placement cell for B.Sc. programs at Agurchand Manmull Jain College?
faqs.answer: {Source: B.Sc. students & alumni} Effectiveness of Placement Cell for B.Sc Programs at Agurchand Manmull Jain College The placement cell at Agurchand Manmull Jain College appears to have had some success in securing job offers for its B.Sc programme students. Here's what we've gathered: * Placement Statistics : According to student reviews, around 40% of students were placed through companies such as IBM, Just Dial and Infosys. * Company Offerings : While the placement cell secured job offers, the package offered was relatively low, ranging from INR10,000 to INR15,000 per month, which might not appeal to all students. In summary, while the placement cell at Agurchand Manmull Jain College does seem to have achieved some placements, the limited package offerings may deter some students from accepting these job offers. However, it's essential to note that this assessment is based on student feedback and might not reflect the entire picture.

reviews.review_heading: Really good, you can join.
reviews.review_text: I'm not in a hostel, but I know that the infrastructure is good, and the internet is slow, which is also good because students will not be able to use mobile phones, and that is also really good for studies. In sports, all the things are there, you can perform if you have the skill, you perform, and are selected for the team.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college, and it provides the best placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities were good. There was a separate hostel for boys and girls. The bathrooms were neat. The hostel mess was good and tasty. The canteen was also available. Infrastructure was good. Classrooms were neat. Labs were good. Library was good. Medical facilities were available. The Wi-Fi was also available.

reviews.review_heading: College provided good and best placements.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was good. The classroom looks very beautiful with AC. The lab was pretty with several computers. We have a huge library. The Wi-Fi connection was available. The hostel facilities were good with a separate hostel for boys and girls. The food was good. We had a tennis court at our college.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is really good. The food service in the hostel is really very bad, and the taste is really worse. I do not stay in the hostel, and my friend told me that it is a waste. He paid Rs. 23,000 for the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is recommended only if students are doing professional courses side by side.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is good enough. The canteen, hostel mess and dining facilities are poor. Sports and games are not promoted but we can train and practice by ourselves. There is no library in the hostel. There is no medical first aid center in the hostel except for room maintenance. Our college hostel is not encouraged.

reviews.review_heading: This college has a green campus, good infrastructure, and classrooms.
reviews.review_text: The campus has very nice and green infrastructure. All classrooms are smart classrooms, allowing students to study easily with modern technology. There is also a new library where students can read any book for free. In terms of sports, there is a basketball court, a cricket stadium, and an indoor stadium available.

reviews.review_heading: AM Jain College is a great choice for B.Com CS with strong academics and placements.
reviews.review_text: AM Jain College offers excellent infrastructure for the B.Com (Corporate Secretaryship) program. The classrooms are well-equipped with modern facilities, and the library provides a vast collection of books, journals, and digital resources. Computer labs and seminar halls enhance learning through practical exposure. The hostel provides a comfortable stay with well-maintained rooms, hygienic food, Wi-Fi, and recreational facilities. Security and discipline are prioritized, ensuring a safe environm...

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good. Food and canteen facility are below average.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi facility is provided. Food quality is not good. Hoster facilities are quite good. The management is not getting proper contact in canteen and mess. Its difficult for the students to eat in canteen as many students are coming from out of the city. They eat both breakfast and lunch in college, we raised complaint but they do not listen.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for the amount they are providing.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good for my curriculum. The hostel is also good, and it is near to the campus, like 5 minutes away. The quality of the food provided in the canteen was good and worth the price they charge. For sports, it's only for the students who have prior experience, not for the freshers, even if they are interested.

reviews.review_heading: AM Jain College is really the best college. You can learn many things and gain knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is really good and neat. The way they treat students is really good. The food is good. They arrange some programs to make students happy. The warden is good with students. There is security to stay in the hostel. There is a separate hostel for girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with their teaching.
reviews.review_text: Campus is quite greenery. Computer Science and other departments have been improved over the years. The standard of food is not good enough. They must improve their canteen foods. But Dosa is an exception. For sports, they must make some good decisions to win over university tournaments.

reviews.review_heading: The best college-AMJC, Beautiful memories.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good, and college infrastructure is green and unique. There are 2 canteens. One canteen named Others Kitchen is good, and another one, Sapna Canteen, is not hygienic. There are 2 libraries, Shift 1 and Shift 2 Libraries. Both are functioning properly.

reviews.review_heading: Studies were average, and college life was totally missed. They are going to improve.
reviews.review_text: My college infrastructure is very simple, but all facilities are available, such as the ground, canteen (3), indoor stadium, auditorium, and labs. They should improve their main block building; this was like an 80s or 90s college. There is no smart class in the main block. All over, they should improve their infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: A. M. Jain College is a prestigious institution in Chennai.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi facilities are not available inside the campus, and the labs are neat and clean. Classrooms are comfortable for every student.
The library is a calm and silent place.
I don't know about hostels; I'm not studying in one.
Canteens are neat and clean.
In case of a medical emergency, first aid kits are available.
Sports are more important in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges to complete our UG course.
reviews.review_text: There are high facilities and infrastructure available for our course and department. There are clean classrooms and highly cost benches for sitting. Our college provides good facilities. The infrastructure of the hostel and canteen is neat, but the food is average. Overall, our college is good at everything.

highlights.summary:
GUVI stands for Grab Ur Vernacular Imprint, was established in the year 2014. It is an Edtech firm supported by IIT-M and IIM-A. It was acquired by HCL group in 2022. This platform specializes in tech upskilling through courses in regional languages (English, Hindi, Tamil, Telugu), catering to over 3 million learners globally.

GUVI aims to break language barriers in technology education, providing personalized learning solutions that include online courses, upskilling, and recruitment opportunities. The platform focuses on practical and industry-aligned skills in Web development, data science, and AI. GUVI emphasizes employability, providing coding practice, placement preparation, and job connections.

Here are GUVI Highlights:

college_info.college_name: GUVI Courses & Certifications Online

faqs.answer: GUVI provides a varied range of technology courses. These primarily cover programming, Artificial Intelligence, Web Development, Data Science, and Machine learning. Their curriculum includes popular programming languages, cloud computing, mobile app development, and web technologies. Also, these courses are bifurcated based on various levels, from beginners to advanced.
faqs.question: Q: What type of courses are available on GUVI?

faqs.answer: GUVI for Corporates is a comprehensive platform designed to meet the training, hiring, and corporate social responsibility (CSR) needs of businesses. It offers tailored training programs across various domains to bridge skill gaps, ensuring employees are equipped with industry-relevant skills. Additionally, GUVI facilitates a zero-cost hiring process, connecting companies with pre-qualified tech talent. The platform also enhances CSR initiatives by providing training to local communities, promoting inclusivity and economic self-sufficiency. With a focus on customization and flexibility, GUVI empowers organizations to optimize their workforce and social impact effectively.
faqs.question: Q: What is Guvi for corporates?

faqs.answer: Guvi provides comprehensive placement preparation for students through its interactive platform, focusing on enhancing aptitude skills essential for job placements. The curriculum includes modules on quantitative aptitude, logical reasoning, and data interpretation, tailored for specific companies like Infosys and TCS. Students benefit from a mobile-friendly design, allowing them to study on-the-go. The content is crafted by industry experts, ensuring high-quality education that emphasizes understanding over rote memorization. This approach helps students grasp concepts thoroughly, preparing them effectively for competitive exams and interviews. Additionally, Guvi's platform offers personalized learning experiences, enabling students to identify their strengths and areas for improvement, ultimately boosting their confidence and readiness for the job market.
faqs.question: Q: What placement preparation does Guvi provides to its students?

faqs.answer: GUVI stands out from other platforms by offering a unique blend of features tailored to make tech education more accessible and effective. Its multilingual content, gamified learning experiences, and industry-aligned curriculum cater to a diverse audience, ensuring practical skills and job readiness.Multilingual Content: Courses offered in English, Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu to make tech education accessible to a diverse audience.Micro-Learning Approach: Bite-sized video lessons break down complex concepts for better retention and flexibility in learning.Gamified Learning Experience: Uses gamification elements to engage and motivate learners.Industry-Aligned Curriculum: Collaborates with tech companies to align course content with industry needs.Coding Practice Platform: Provides an integrated environment for practical coding practice.Focus on Employability: Emphasizes job readiness with placement preparation and connections to job opportunities.Affordable Pricing: Offers quality tech education at a lower cost compared to traditional or international platforms.Blend of Self-Paced and Guided Learning: Offers both self-paced courses and structured, mentor-led programs.Community-Driven Approach: Encourages peer-to-peer learning and networking through a strong community of learners and mentors.
faqs.question: Q: What makes GUVI different from other platforms?

college_info.college_name: Center for Health Management Studies and Research, Bharati Vidyapeeth: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: Established in 2009, Center for Health Management Studies and Research, Bharati Vidyapeeth is a private institute in Pune, Maharashtra. At the PG and Certificate levels, the institute offers 9 courses across 3 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular Center for Health Management Studies and Research, Bharati Vidyapeeth programs include MBA/PGDM, PG Diploma, MHA and Certificate. Center for Health Management Studies and Research, Bharati Vidyapeeth courses are provided in several streams including Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 105 students. The fees at Center for Health Management Studies and Research, Bharati Vidyapeeth ranges between INR 30,000 to 3,30,000 for the different courses. Center for Health Management Studies and Research, Bharati Vidyapeeth placements are vibrant, with the average median salary standing at around INR 4,48,000. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Center for Health Management Studies and Research, Bharati Vidyapeeth offers diverse programmes at PG and Certificate levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the PG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as MBA/PGDM, PG Diploma and MHA. Whereas, at Certificate level, Center for Health Management Studies and Research, Bharati Vidyapeeth offers courses such as Certificate. Center for Health Management Studies and Research, Bharati Vidyapeeth fee structure for all the courses is around INR 30,000 to 3,30,000.

faqs.answer: Rayat Bahra is a University that offers various UG and PG cours. It offer a wide range of courses including UG programmes, and PG programmes. The institute offer more than 20 courses like BTech, MBA, MTech, and BVoc. The best course varies with the interests of each candidate, and the choice is very subjective. For a candidate wishing to build a career in Engineering, the BTech course would be the best choice. Meanwhile, someone who wishes to build a career in Management, the MBA course would be the best for them.
faqs.question: Q: Which is the top course offered at Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur?

faqs.answer: Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur is a private college and was established in 2008. Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur Campus courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with the Engineering stream and offers courses in several departments, such as Nursing, Management, Pharmacy, Law, Education, etc. The college has been accredited by eminent bodies such as the AICTE and the INC. Further, the college guarantees placement assistance to students and offers job opportunities in renowned brands. Some of the top recruiters at Rayat Bahra Punjab are Nestle, Persistent, Wipro, Roya Enfield, John Deere, Godrej, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My college is very good for students. I'm very glad to take admission in this college.

content.Placements: My course B.Tech IT has a scope and it is a nice course. Many companies visit to hire students for placements and the packages offered are high. College deals with many companies for placements for students and college is good for students.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are very good. They are neat and clean. Campus is very good. College environment is very peaceful. The quality of facilities is excellent. Hostel is very good. There are 5 canteen, stationery shops, etc., available. There are sports and games facilities available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: In 2025, more and better placements, students work harder.

content.Placements: 50% of students in this course. The companies came to the college for interviews, and many students were doing jobs. Good income sources, many companies like students' work, good experience. Many parents of students got excellent internships and they earned.
content.Infrastructure: All kinds of facilities, the classrooms are also good, Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, library are always excellent, all facilities available in each lab, the hostel is also good and the food and drinks are also very good. Sports are always excellent. Enjoy more.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Rayat Bahra, Hoshiarpur Campus.

content.Placements: Placements are available in our college. You can opt for off-campus placements. Companies visit our college for internships in the third semester.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. It is spread over many acres of land. Our college has a ground and a huge canteen. The campus is highly hygienic and neat. The parking facility is available on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides very good placements.

content.Placements: Around 80% of our batch students get placed in software companies with the highest salary package of 10 LPA. The lowest salary package is 3.37 LPA offered by TCS and the average salary package is 5 LPA. Top recruiters companies are Wipro, Bebo Technologies, Cloud Analogy, Teachnook, and All E Technologies. The roles offered are trainee developer, database developer, and software tester.
content.Infrastructure: Lab facilities are not much good. The quality of labs is improved.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are helpful and qualified with good degrees. They teach from depth but the course curriculum is bad. Passing semester exams is difficult.

admission_overview.college_name: Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur admission 2025is ongoing, candidates can participate in the merit-based admission process to secure a seat at various UG and PG courses. The courses are offered to both domestic and international candidates in a full-time/regular mode.Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpuroffers courses in the fields of Commerce, Engineering, Science, and Law. The application process is online and is available on the official website of the group of institutes. Learn more about Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur and the courses it offers through the information below.

Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur Campus applications are ongoing for the academic session 2025-26. Candidates seeking admission can register directly through the group of institute's official website. There are more than 10 courses with various specialisations. The group of institutes offers courses in Engineering, Law, Science and other streams. Check out the highlights table below to learn more aboutRayat Bahra Hoshiarpur courses:
Particulars
Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study

Programmes Offered
10+ with various specialisations
How to apply?
https://rayatbahrahsp.com/#
Level of programmes offered
Undergraduate, Postgraduate
Popular programmes
BTech| MTech| BCA| BA-LLB
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, it is indicative.

Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur Campus offers more than 10 courses at the UG and PG course levels to students across the fields of Law, Science, and Engineering.Rayat Bahra admission 2025to the courses is based on a merit-based process. Check out all the popular courses along with their selection & eligibility criteria in the table below:
Common Eligibility
Selection Criteria
