As per the details available online on the website of Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur, the group of institutes follows a merit-based admission process for all the courses. Candidates are required to create an account with a strong password and fill out the application form. TheRayat Bahra Hoshiarpur admission processis a multi-step process inclusive of application, selection rounds, document verification, payment of fee, and seat allotment. A step-by-step process that candidates must follow is as follows:
STEP 1: Rayat Bahra Application Process 2025

The application form for admission to various courses is available on the official website, Candidates are required to create an account with a strong password to access the application form. Accurate details of academics and work experience should be put on the application form. Candidates receive a confirmation once the fee payment is made for the application form.
STEP 2: Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur Shortlist Release and Final Offer

Candidates are shortlisted based on the information mentioned on the application form. Candidates who make it to the final shortlist and receive the final offer are required to pay the course fee and secure their seat.
STEP 3: Rayat Bahra Document Verification & Payment of Admission Fee

Candidates must be available with the list of documents to facilitate a smooth admission process. However, the fee payment must be done online through the means mentioned. Candidates can learn more aboutRayat Bahra Hoshiarpur feestructure and payment process through the official website of the group of institutes.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Rayat Bahra University Hoshiarpur?
faqs.answer: Getting into Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur depends upon various factors such as meeting the minimum eligibility criteria and performance of candidates in the selection rounds conducted by the group of institutes. If candidates meet the eligibility criteria, it is possible to get admission directly. The admission process is merit-based and candidates can participate in the admission process by filling out the application form.

faqs.question: What are the selection criteria for admission to Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to the courses offered by Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur must meet the eligibility criteria and follow the selection criteria to get shortlisted. The eligibility criteria for the courses on offer depend on factors such as the course level. For UG courses candidates are generally required to have a minimum of 45% aggregate. Candidates can fill out the appliation form online or offline to inititate the admission process.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur?
faqs.answer: Yes, Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur Campus accepts direct admissions for the courses. Candidates wishing to get admission in the Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur Campus must meet the eligibility and selection criteria. Rayat Bahra follows a merit-based admission process to shortlist the candidates for the various UG and PG programmes. Candidates who do get shortlisted are required to pay the tuition and hostel fee to confirm their admission to the course.

faqs.question: How can I apply for Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur?
faqs.answer: The Rayat Bahra Hoshiarpur application process for various courses is ongoing, and candidates can access the same on the official website of the group of institutes. Candidates must create their login ID with a strong password to fill out the application on the official website. Candidates must follow the following steps for the online application:Step 1:Visit the official website and click on the 'Admission' section, and then select the "Apply Now 2025" section to open the application form.Step 2:Create a login ID with a strong password.Step 3:Fill out the form with accurate academic and work experience details.Step 4:Pay the application form fee and get the confirmation once the payment is done successfully.Step 5:Candidates can download the application form to keep for future reference.

reviews.review_heading: My college is very good for students. I'm very glad to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are very good. They are neat and clean. Campus is very good. College environment is very peaceful. The quality of facilities is excellent. Hostel is very good. There are 5 canteen, stationery shops, etc., available. There are sports and games facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: In 2025, more and better placements, students work harder.
reviews.review_text: All kinds of facilities, the classrooms are also good, Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, library are always excellent, all facilities available in each lab, the hostel is also good and the food and drinks are also very good. Sports are always excellent. Enjoy more.

reviews.review_heading: The very good facility in college and good environment.
reviews.review_text: The college facilities are good, and the staff behave well with students. Wi-Fi is good and provides a proper connection. The classrooms are decent, but the fans are slow, and there is no AC in the classrooms. The library fans are also slow. The hostel facilities are bad, but sports are better.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rayat Bahra, Hoshiarpur Campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. It is spread over many acres of land. Our college has a ground and a huge canteen. The campus is highly hygienic and neat. The parking facility is available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides very good placements.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good campus life.

There are 2 to 3 canteens on campus. Many computers are not working in the lab. Our campus has a cricket ground and a football ground with much greenery on the campus. Medical facilities are available 24X7. An ambulance is provided by the management for emergency

Quality of the food is good in hostel and canteen.

The quality of mess food is good and the canteen is also well stocked and offers food at reasonable prices.

college_info.college_name: Mandsaur University

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Mandsaur University admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Mandsaur University:

placements.overview: Established in 1984, Mandsaur University is a private university in Madhya Pradesh. The institute is approved by the CCIM, NCTE and PCI. At the UG, PG and After 10th levels, the institute offers 46 courses across 18 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular Mandsaur University programs include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, Executive MBA/PGDM and B.Sc. Mandsaur University courses are provided in several streams including Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Design and Mass Communication & Media, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 646 students. The fees at Mandsaur University ranges between INR 21,000 to 2,84,000 for the different courses. Mandsaur University placements are vibrant, with the average median salary standing at around INR 5,16,250. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Best faculty, good placement.

review_content.Placements: The top companies hiring at this university are Amazon and Google. The highest package is 5LPA. The recruitment company is 100+. The top role is in engineering. In the best company, students get a 2-month internship and 100% placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good room, best food in the mess, best source of technology. Best facility, like the infrastructure, all study material available. Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, the big library, the best facility, girl and boy hostels are available, and privacy will be available for course-related labs.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Many events are organized by the college and teachers are very good.

review_content.Placements: Students are eligible for placements after the 7th semester. The college does not have many companies visiting this year as they have a low placement rate for the year 2024 for the B.Tech CSE branch. Only 5 out of 57 students have been placed in core IT companies from the college placement drives where they have many companies visiting for sales roles. like they had a placement of 44 LPA in Amazon two years ago, but after that, there's no.
review_content.Infrastructure: All Indian festivals are organised like Garba, Holi, Matki, etc. Almost all the books of the related course are available. If they are not available, they can be ordered from the library staff. All facilities are available in classrooms for the convenience of students such as projectors, benches, and fans.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: BR Nahata College of Pharmacy is an excellent college for pharmacy course with good placement.

review_content.Placements: Around 60% of students got placed. In pharmacy, the average salary package offered is 1.08 LPA to 2.4 LPA. Recruiting companies are Macleods Pharmaceuticals Ltd and Sun Pharma Pharmaceuticals Ltd. Students about 7 CGPA are eligible for internships in colleges in Bhopal and Vadodara. Students are offered roles in production, qa, and qc sectors.
review_content.Infrastructure: All department labs are available, like Pharmaceutics, Pharmacology, etc. Big halls are used as classrooms. Library is available. Rooms at the hostel are good enough for both living and studying for students. The quality of food in the mess is above average. Canteen is also available to outside students. Sports activities are held every week.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements, infrastructure is getting better as it is renovation.

review_content.Placements: More than 30 percent of students are placed from my batch, and placements are still going. The lowest package that was offered was 3 LPA, and the highest till now was 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies are GKMIT, TCS, Lucent, etc. More than 50 percent of students got internships in several companies like GKMIT, Indeed Inspiring Infotech, Infosys, etc. Roles offered are Python Developer, Full Stack Developer, App Developer, Cloud Engineer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good. We have a central library, Wi-Fi facility, labs, etc. Hostel facility is also good. Everything is provided in the hostel, like washing machines, geysers, and every day the room is cleaned. Three times food is given along with tea and snacks.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Campus life you crave for.

review_content.Placements: Almost 75 percent of students were placed. The highest package offered is 8 LPA, the lowest is 2.5 LPA, and the average package is 5 LPA. As internships are mandatory in our college, companies also come for internship recruitment. All students are eligible for interviews, and most students get selected, with some internships being paid and some unpaid.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our department is pretty good, located at the top with an awesome view. The classrooms are good enough to concentrate, and the labs are well-equipped with one system allocated per student, which is beneficial. We have a common library among all departments, consisting of three floors, with all types of books available, whether academic or non-academic.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Biotechnology - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It's all about my college. This college is the best for life science .

review_content.Placements: In my batch, there are a total of 20 students and 9 are placed in pharma companies like Cipla, Lupin, and Byju's. The average package after this course is 2 to 3 lacs annually. The highest percentage of internships is 98 percent. The role offered in this course is that of a microbiologist .
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure on campus is big and beautiful. Wi-Fi facilities are also available. The labs are fully safe and clean. Biosafety labs are available. Hostels are clean and provide Wi-Fi. Food is fresh and available in a mess. Annual sports activities like inter-departmental games.

review_summary.college_name: Mandsaur University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best faculty, good placement.

content.Placements: The top companies hiring at this university are Amazon and Google. The highest package is 5LPA. The recruitment company is 100+. The top role is in engineering. In the best company, students get a 2-month internship and 100% placement.
content.Infrastructure: Good room, best food in the mess, best source of technology. Best facility, like the infrastructure, all study material available. Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, the big library, the best facility, girl and boy hostels are available, and privacy will be available for course-related labs.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Many events are organized by the college and teachers are very good.

content.Placements: Students are eligible for placements after the 7th semester. The college does not have many companies visiting this year as they have a low placement rate for the year 2024 for the B.Tech CSE branch. Only 5 out of 57 students have been placed in core IT companies from the college placement drives where they have many companies visiting for sales roles. like they had a placement of 44 LPA in Amazon two years ago, but after that, there's no.
content.Infrastructure: All Indian festivals are organised like Garba, Holi, Matki, etc. Almost all the books of the related course are available. If they are not available, they can be ordered from the library staff. All facilities are available in classrooms for the convenience of students such as projectors, benches, and fans.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: BR Nahata College of Pharmacy is an excellent college for pharmacy course with good placement.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students got placed. In pharmacy, the average salary package offered is 1.08 LPA to 2.4 LPA. Recruiting companies are Macleods Pharmaceuticals Ltd and Sun Pharma Pharmaceuticals Ltd. Students about 7 CGPA are eligible for internships in colleges in Bhopal and Vadodara. Students are offered roles in production, qa, and qc sectors.
content.Infrastructure: All department labs are available, like Pharmaceutics, Pharmacology, etc. Big halls are used as classrooms. Library is available. Rooms at the hostel are good enough for both living and studying for students. The quality of food in the mess is above average. Canteen is also available to outside students. Sports activities are held every week.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good placements, infrastructure is getting better as it is renovation.

content.Placements: More than 30 percent of students are placed from my batch, and placements are still going. The lowest package that was offered was 3 LPA, and the highest till now was 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies are GKMIT, TCS, Lucent, etc. More than 50 percent of students got internships in several companies like GKMIT, Indeed Inspiring Infotech, Infosys, etc. Roles offered are Python Developer, Full Stack Developer, App Developer, Cloud Engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good. We have a central library, Wi-Fi facility, labs, etc. Hostel facility is also good. Everything is provided in the hostel, like washing machines, geysers, and every day the room is cleaned. Three times food is given along with tea and snacks.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Campus life you crave for.

content.Placements: Almost 75 percent of students were placed. The highest package offered is 8 LPA, the lowest is 2.5 LPA, and the average package is 5 LPA. As internships are mandatory in our college, companies also come for internship recruitment. All students are eligible for interviews, and most students get selected, with some internships being paid and some unpaid.
content.Infrastructure: Our department is pretty good, located at the top with an awesome view. The classrooms are good enough to concentrate, and the labs are well-equipped with one system allocated per student, which is beneficial. We have a common library among all departments, consisting of three floors, with all types of books available, whether academic or non-academic.

paragraphs: Mandsaur University admissionsare completely merit-based. The institute offers 46 programmes.Mandsaur Universityoffers courses across various specialisations and aspirants need to apply for courses through its official website. Mandsaur University admission is done based on scores of exams like JEE Main, NEET, and CBSE 10th. The university offers over 46 courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in field, such as Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Design, Mass Communication and Media, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science, Teaching and Education, Banking and Finance and Insurance. Read more details around Mandsaur University admission in the following article.
At UG, PG and After 10th level, B.P.Ed, B.Com, M.Lib.Sc., etc. are among the top courses offered at Mandsaur University.

hostel.description: Mandsaur University has a separate Girls hostel and Boys hostel in the campus. 24X7 electricity, Internet connectivity through Wi-Fi, security and state-of-the-art plumbing. Great care is taken to maintain hygienic conditions and cleanliness. Hostel common rooms are fully equipped with HD TV network, indoor games, news papers and laundry staff.

library.description: Mandsaur University has a well stocked Central Library which has  47542 volumes with 12923 titles of textbooks, reference books, technical journals, periodicals, and competition books on various subjects for the students and faculty, There is subscription to 107 print journals, 30 magazines and 276 E-journals through Science Direct (elsviour)  & 1500 E-journals through Delnet. University Library has Reference section, Information Center and E-Knowledge center.

reviews.review_heading: Best faculty, good placement.
reviews.review_text: Good room, best food in the mess, best source of technology. Best facility, like the infrastructure, all study material available. Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, the big library, the best facility, girl and boy hostels are available, and privacy will be available for course-related labs.

reviews.review_heading: Many events are organized by the college and teachers are very good.
reviews.review_text: All Indian festivals are organised like Garba, Holi, Matki, etc. Almost all the books of the related course are available. If they are not available, they can be ordered from the library staff. All facilities are available in classrooms for the convenience of students such as projectors, benches, and fans.

reviews.review_heading: BR Nahata College of Pharmacy is an excellent college for pharmacy course with good placement.
reviews.review_text: All department labs are available, like Pharmaceutics, Pharmacology, etc. Big halls are used as classrooms. Library is available. Rooms at the hostel are good enough for both living and studying for students. The quality of food in the mess is above average. Canteen is also available to outside students. Sports activities are held every week.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, infrastructure is getting better as it is renovation.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. We have a central library, Wi-Fi facility, labs, etc. Hostel facility is also good. Everything is provided in the hostel, like washing machines, geysers, and every day the room is cleaned. Three times food is given along with tea and snacks.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life you crave for.
reviews.review_text: Our department is pretty good, located at the top with an awesome view. The classrooms are good enough to concentrate, and the labs are well-equipped with one system allocated per student, which is beneficial. We have a common library among all departments, consisting of three floors, with all types of books available, whether academic or non-academic.

reviews.review_heading: It's all about my college. This college is the best for life science .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure on campus is big and beautiful. Wi-Fi facilities are also available. The labs are fully safe and clean. Biosafety labs are available. Hostels are clean and provide Wi-Fi. Food is fresh and available in a mess. Annual sports activities like inter-departmental games.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities with supportive faculty, but really bad crowd.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good enough with sufficient space and availability of a library with required books and journals, computer labs, and practical laboratories. Wi-Fi is only available for hostel students. Classrooms are large enough for 100 students in each class. The quality of facilities in the hostel is okay, as I heard from my friend who stays there. The canteen is not hygienic, and the quality of food prepared is disgusting. Sports and games facilities are great.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mandsaur University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good at Mandsaur University. They have well-designed labs, a vast library with thousands of books, a big playground for sports, canteen and hostel facilities for both boys and girls. The campus life is good here. It is a well-managed campus.

reviews.review_heading: Mandsaur University: The reality.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good as the campus is very big with hostel facility available. The classrooms and labs are equipped with Wi-Fi facility. A sports ground is available but can only be used after the college hours or at the time of fests. Quality of food is good in the mess, but no medical facilities are provided.

reviews.review_heading: Best faculty, good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good; there are labs, big classrooms and a library with a lot of books. The college provides all the facilities, like Wi-Fi and smart classes. There is 1 canteen in our college that serves hygienic food. In the college, we have a playground where you can play all types of games.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Mandsaur for the B.Com course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Our college is surrounded by greenery. It provides a hostel facility for students to accommodate. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Our college has libraries. We have labs to gain practical knowledge. Extra curricular activities are also there for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the top colleges in our state.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were very good. Our college had very good Wi-Fi, a big building, a garden, computer labs, and a big library. The quality of the food served was fresh. Sports activities were available with great grounds, swimming pool, cricket ground, football ground, volleyball court, and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mandsaur University.
reviews.review_text: The department maintains grounds and athletic sports facilities daily. They manage the recycling program, sustainable waste initiatives, and custodial services. They provide preventative maintenance and ensure efficient and safe transportation services. They provide quality facilities efficiently and sustainably that enable Mandsaur University to excel in teaching, research, and service to the community. Whether you're studying, socialising, playing a sport, enjoying the arts or planning your ca...

reviews.review_heading: The fee structure is good at our university with scholarship benefits.
reviews.review_text: Labs at our university are not good. Wi-Fi is available but not for personal use. We have the best library in Madsaur with the best collection of books. The hostel facilities are average. Good quality food is available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are not available regularly. Sports and games are the best part of our college.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the faculty as all are just completed graduates. overall it is quite good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good. Wi-Fi Facility is available for the students. Hostel rooms were good but sometimes the food is not properly cooked in the canteen. Wi-Fi Facilities are also available for hostel students.

college_info.college_name: St. Joseph's College For Women, Tirupur: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding St. Joseph's College For Women, Tirupur Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: St. Joseph's College For Women, Tirupur offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.Sc. and M.Com. St. Joseph's College For Women, Tirupur courses are offered to students in Full Time mode.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The campus and library is huge and great for students.

review_content.Placements: Many of the companies come up during the Master of Commerce course, like Genpact, Cookme, PWC, and many more. Salary is also best. DSCA offers a 5-year Degree Programme of BArch (Bachelor of Architecture) undergraduate course that is recognised by the Council of Architecture, New Delhi. The BArch programme has been divided into 10 terms or semesters, and it provides the chance to enhance high-level creativity, artistic skills, visual perception, creative thinking, and critical awareness. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Dayananda Sagar College of Architecture offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses to students. The courses are offered across the Architecture stream. At the undergraduate level, the college offers a BArch course. At the postgraduate level, the college provides an MArch course in Interior Design for students. DSCA offers a PhD programme in Architecture through its affiliation with Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU), according to dsca.edu.in.

faqs.answer: A:    Dayananda Sagar College of Architecture BArch eligibility varies slightly depending on various factors. faqs.question: How can I get admission in Dayananda Sagar College of Architecture?

answer.text: For Dayananda Sagar College of Architecture BArch course admission, the candidate should have passed the Class 12 or equivalent examination with atleast than 50% aggregate marks in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics (PCM). They should also be NATA-qualified according to the standards of the Council of Architecture (COA).Academic Qualification: Pass in higher secondary (+2) or equivalent (PUC/CBSE, XII/ISC, XII). Minimum 50% aggregate marks in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics (PCM). Also, English must be one of the languages studied.NATA: A minimum score of 80/200 in NATA is required.Management Quota: Students can seek admission through the management quota by contacting the Admissions Department at DSI (dsca.edu.in).

review_summary.college_name: Dayananda Sagar College of Architecture Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A creative and supportive environment for budding architects.

content.Placements: Many students are able to land jobs in design firms. Faculty members assist students in ensuring their portfolios are strong for placement success. While some choose to further their education or practice on their own. Almost all students who take part in the placement round get placed.
content.Infrastructure: Well equipped studios with a computer lab and 3d printing lab facilities. LAN is provided in every studio with multiple outlets. The hostel is in very close proximity to the architecture block where the provisions of 2 sharing are given. The food quality is great.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: General review of college.

content.Placements: College has assigned a team that looks into the placement for the 10th semester internships. I am yet in 3rd year and have seen our seniors work for various firms, even the guest lecturers who have been to our college. So I would say that it is sufficient.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are quite satisfactory, with labs being equipped with basic software and ethernet. Library is constantly being updated with newer editions and releases, covering various subjects - interiors, MEP, etc. The mess is well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the college.

content.Placements: The architecture course doesn't have placements. Internships are provided purely based on portfolios and the performance of students in the interviews.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi almost never works. The QR codes are expired. Labs are equipped with AutoCAD and SketchUp and multiple other software, but the systems are old. The food in the mess is really good. They provide unlimited food for people who stay in hostels. The girls' hostel is very bad. The maintenance isn't great, and the space provided is not sufficient. Medical facilities are a bare minimum. There is a football and cricket ground.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Dayananda Sagar College of Architecture.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities are not structured in this field. But the college helps and guides many of my seniors to get placed in good design firms with roles at different levels. Faculty members guide and help students to make strong portfolios that help us get placed in good firms and pursue further education.
content.Infrastructure: Campus has well-equipped studios and computer labs with the necessary software. They are well-maintained. Library has good resources and a wide collection of books. A wide range of journals and magazines are updated from time to time. The administration provides digital copies that can be easily accessed. 3D printing machines are available for us. It explore the technology and encourage innovation and design thinking.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are helpful and approachable.

content.Placements: Although the college is still developing on the placement front, faculty is always very approachable in this regard and give us recommendations and referrals that help us in this field. The students are well prepared through strong guidance and practical knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: The library is well-equipped and helps us with all the research work and our design work. The labs have systems with the required software installed and are used by students. In terms of other infrastructure, the college has a ground and three canteens that serve hygienic and good food.
